title: cerastium arcticum f. nigrescens
intro: Cerastium arcticum f. nigrescens, also known as the Arctic Mouse-Ear or Black-stemmed Mouse-Ear, is a flowering plant species within the Cerastium genus, characterized by its dark green, oval-shaped leaves and small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Cerastium arcticum f. nigrescens include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
